title: dispatch_request_consecutive_addresses_differ test ignores alive return value
description: Both dispatch_payment calls in dispatch_request_consecutive_addresses_differ discard the bool return value. The test still passes if dispatch_payment returns false (channel closed) because the channel has capacity 4 and messages are buffered. A future refactor that closes the channel on error would silently produce two identical 'no message sent' states and the assert_ne would panic with 'address reply must have been sent' rather than 'addresses must be distinct'. Add: assert\!(dispatch_payment(...).await, 'first call must not close channel'); and same for the second call.
